authority_boundary: This registry mirrors and classifies formalism records. It does not create source authority, proof authority, execution authority, continuity standing, or admissibility standing.

records.name: Transition Admissibility
records.source_authority: StegVerse ecosystem formalism and transition-table artifacts
records.purpose: Determine whether a proposed transition may bind consequence under declared authority, policy, evidence, and review posture.
non_claims: Registry intake does not prove admissibility.
Registry intake does not replace source formalism tests.

records.name: Commit-Time Validity
records.purpose: Preserve the distinction between prior review and valid standing at the moment consequence is committed.
non_claims: Glossary presence does not prove commit-time validity.
Commit-time validity requires current standing evidence.

records.name: Receipt-Bound Execution
records.purpose: Tie execution or consequence claims to durable receipt evidence and reconstructable standing.
non_claims: A receipt alone does not grant execution authority.
Execution standing depends on the accepted authority and policy context.

records.name: Reconstructability
records.purpose: Allow a later reviewer to reconstruct why a transition, decision, or handoff had standing without relying on chat memory.
non_claims: Reconstructability does not by itself authorize the original action.
Reconstructability supports review and continuity evidence.

records.name: Drift Denial
records.purpose: Deny or pause consequence when relevant authority, policy, evidence, identity, or state changes before commit time.
non_claims: Drift denial is not a general refusal to review.
Drift denial depends on relevant changed state.

records.name: Cross-Repository Continuation Receipt
records.purpose: Record why a task may continue across repositories without relying on chat-session memory.
non_claims: A continuation receipt does not create production authority.
A continuation receipt must be interpreted against current repository state.

next_action: Create formalism detail pages and crosswalk records for each intake record.
